rules.ruleName: AI 项目 业务后端不可用

clickhouseConfig.logQL:
SELECT
    domain,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt_5xx
FROM nginxlogs.nginx_access
WHERE
    timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE
    AND server_ip = '172.30.55.145'
   AND status BETWEEN 500 AND 599
GROUP BY domain
ORDER BY cnt_5xx DESC;
clickhouseConfig.annotations: 域名 ${labels.domain} 在一分钟内出现了 ${labels.cnt_5xx} 错误，请尽快处理！

prometheusConfig.annotations: MySQL实例：${labels.name}，意外宕机。
三楼机房，${labels.alarm_name}

rules.ruleName: 域名三分钟内超过 300次 4xx 错误，请注意相关业务使用状态

clickhouseConfig.logQL:
SELECT
    domain,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt_4xx
FROM nginxlogs.nginx_access
WHERE
    timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 3 MINUTE
    AND server_ip = '10.1.8.3'
    AND status BETWEEN 400 AND 499
GROUP BY domain
ORDER BY cnt_4xx DESC;
clickhouseConfig.annotations: 域名 ${labels.domain} 在一分钟内出现了 ${labels.cnt_4xx} 错误，请尽快处理！

clickhouseConfig.logQL:
SELECT
    domain,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt_5xx
FROM nginxlogs.nginx_access
WHERE
    timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE
    AND server_ip = '10.1.8.3'
    AND status BETWEEN 500 AND 599
GROUP BY domain
ORDER BY cnt_5xx DESC;
clickhouseConfig.annotations: 域名 ${labels.domain} 在一分钟内出现了 ${labels.cnt_5xx} 错误，请尽快处理！

prometheusConfig.annotations: 当前 ${labels.job} 中 ${labels.name}服务器内存使用率达到了 90 %以上，请注意查看。

rules.ruleName: WMS 后端应用 5xx 告警

clickhouseConfig.logQL:
SELECT
    domain,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt_backend_unavailable
FROM nginxlogs.nginx_access
WHERE
    timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE
    AND server_ip = '10.1.8.3'
    AND domain = 'wms.craneweihua.com'
    AND status BETWEEN 502 AND 504
GROUP BY domain
ORDER BY cnt_backend_unavailable DESC;
clickhouseConfig.annotations: 域名 ${labels.domain} 在一分钟内出现了 ${labels.cnt_backend_unavailable} 错误，请尽快处理！
